channel.title: Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: What I am expecting on my job
item.description: Recently, I had made some bad decisions on my career. I dropped two positions during six months, and then getting back to the studio I was next week. Looking back, I might have wanted to be out of my comfort zone. I read a blog post about it and I totally agreed and loved what he said. (https://maxliani.wordpress.com/2022/01/08/axis-of-comfort/) I’m setting my career goals and personal goals in my life. I wish my job would be like this.

item.title: stairs
item.description: We are still the same even when no one understands us.

item.title: What am I doing?
item.description: 2022 2023 2024 - Finish TRU.. with 1 semester in SFU 2025 2026 - Finish OMSCS

item.title: Hi, my name is Jae.
item.description: Hi, my name is Jae. I’m working as a Lighting TD at ICON Creative Studio, Vancouver, Canada. I have worked on 3D Animation industry for about 4 years. My career was started as lighter and compositor and then kept moving to the technical side step by step. I like learning and digging something new. My interests are shading, rendering and cutting-edge real time related technology. For better understanding on them, I’m taking CS courses as part time student.
